entities.name: Emscripten
entities.context: A tool for compiling code to WebAssembly

entities.name: Binaryen
entities.context: A compiler infrastructure and toolchain library for WebAssembly

entities.name: QuickJS
entities.context: A small and embeddable JavaScript engine

entities.name: Asyncify
entities.context: A compiler transform for enabling asynchronous operations in WebAssembly

relationships.context: V uses Emscripten for compiling code
V uses Binaryen as part of the compilation process
V uses QuickJS as a JavaScript engine
V believes in the benefits of using Asyncify for asynchronous programming
